quote: “The best and most beautiful things in the world cannot be seen or even touched - they must be felt with the heart.”
author: Helen Keller
suggested_action: Try reaching out to a friend or family member, even a quick text or call.  If that feels too daunting right now, perhaps watch an episode of your favorite anime to lift your spirits.
joke: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
hobby_suggestion: Watch a feel-good anime movie tonight.  Something lighthearted and fun might help improve your mood.
challenge: Spend 5 minutes mindfully focusing on your breath. Notice the sensation of the air entering and leaving your body. This can help ground you in the present moment.
affirmation: I am worthy of connection and belonging.
breathing_exercise: Try box breathing: inhale for 4 seconds, hold for 4, exhale for 4, hold for 4. Repeat several times.
